svg.title: AWS End-to-End Security Framework Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing IAM, S3, CloudTrail, VPC, EC2, CloudWatch and SNS services and their relationships

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does internet traffic reach the EC2 web server?')
sendPrompt('What does the Internet Gateway do in a VPC?')
sendPrompt('What is running on the EC2 web server?')
sendPrompt('What would go in the private subnet?')
sendPrompt('What IAM policies were created in this project?')
sendPrompt('How does CloudTrail log all API activity?')
sendPrompt('How is the S3 audit vault secured?')
sendPrompt('How does SNS send email alerts?')

svg.text: Click any service to learn more — dashed line = IAM role assignment
